tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Total Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $157.5 million was $4.9 million lower than the budget

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Farebox Revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox revenue of $93.2 million was $(1.8) million lower than the budget

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Total Expenses Before Non-Cash
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $381.9 million were $6.6 million or 1.7% favorable to the budget

tool_args.label: February 2024 End-of-Month Headcount
tool_args.raw_text: February end-of-month total headcount was 7,837 which was 187 positions lower than the budget

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio
tool_args.raw_text: The February Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio was 33.2%

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Adjusted Cost Per Passenger
tool_args.raw_text: The February Adjusted Cost per Passenger was $27.87

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Revenue Per Passenger
tool_args.raw_text: The February Revenue per Passenger was $8.61

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Ridership vs 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Through February 2024, ridership was 10.8 million, 19.3% above 2023

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Ridership vs 2019 pre-COVID
tool_args.raw_text: (20.1)% below 2019 pre-COVID levels (adjusted for the same number of workdays)

tool_args.label: February 2024 Non-Reimbursable Operating Result YTD
tool_args.raw_text: February non-reimbursable operating results were unfavorable to the budget by $(3.9) million or (1.3)%

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Commutation Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation ridership of 4.5 million was 8.8% above 2023 and 13.1% above the budget

tool_args.label: February 2024 YTD Non-Commutation Ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation ridership of 6.4 million was 27.9% above 2023 and 4.2% below the budget

tool_args.label: Preliminary Close Caveat
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: Financial results are preliminary and subject to adjustment

Michael Reilly, Financial Liaison, is the author of the report

tool_args.label: GCMCO expenses included in LIRR performance indicators
tool_args.raw_text: Expenses for Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMCO) are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations.

payload.claim_text: Expenses for Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMCO) are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations.
payload.subject: LIRR performance indicators

tool_args.label: Adjusted performance indicators methodology note
tool_args.raw_text: Adjusted Fare Box Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees.

payload.claim_text: Adjusted Fare Box Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees. Adjustments have been made to reflect all operating revenue and significant financial impacts that are outside management's control. These adjustments include: Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB Current Payment expenses for retirees, and Removal of the UAAL associated with the LIRR's closed pension plan.
payload.subject: LIRR adjusted performance indicators
